citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at [5:10 p.m.] on [07-
April-2026]. An responsible individual stated, the licensee was helping someone and would not be back until after 8:00
p.m., that evening. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA
and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at [5:10 p.m.] on [07-
April-2026]. An responsible individual stated, the licensee was helping someone and would not be back until after 8:00 
p.m., that evening. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA 
and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
